prompt: Create an ultra-detailed professional cinematic 3D digital poster of Mr Tariq, a stylish young male AI creator seated on a glossy black reflective floor in a relaxed edgy streetwear pose, centered in front of an enormous glowing TikTok-style music-note logo. The character wears a black bucket hat and oversized black hoodie, beige cargo jogger pants, white socks, and custom high-top sneakers with black panels, white laces, teal and hot-pink accents, and TikTok-style logos on the sides; include a small matching logo on one sock. His face is intentionally covered by a soft square blur, while the outfit and pose remain sharp and photorealistic. Use a dark cyberpunk social-media studio environment with neon cyan and hot-pink lighting, glitch fragments, digital particles, reflections, and a wet polished floor. Add exactly 5 floating rounded-rectangle UI panels: 1) upper left TikTok stats card with TikTok logo and the text “28.5K Likes”, “18.3K Followers”, “7.2K Shares”; 2) lower left motivational card reading “Go Viral” and “Create. Inspire. Repeat.”; 3) upper right analytics card reading “Engagement 87.6%” and “Views 325.4K” with a line chart and bar chart; 4) mid-right small card reading “Trending Now” with a flame icon; 5) lower right card reading “Inspire Trends” and “Your Story. Your Voice. Your Impact.” Add exactly 8 TikTok-style music-note symbols in the scene: 1 huge background logo behind the subject, 1 red icon near the top center, 1 cyan icon left of the subject, 1 red icon mid-left, 1 red icon upper-right, 1 cyan icon mid-right, 1 large cyan-and-pink icon near the lower right floor, and 1 cyan-and-pink icon near the lower left floor. Across the character’s torso and knees, place a bright handwritten neon pink signature reading Mr Tariq, with smaller clean white text below reading AI Creator. Make the composition vertical poster format, dramatic low-angle perspective, high contrast, crisp sneaker detail, cinematic rim lighting, volumetric glow, social-media influencer branding, no extra panels, no watermark, no misspelled text.
